description_long: This is a small, simple cabin with a rectangular footprint and a single-story structure. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely made of wood or a similar material, and the roof is a dark, gable style with a moderate pitch. There is a single door on one side, positioned centrally, and a single window adjacent to the door, both of which are small and rectangular. The cabin sits on a flat, circular base that may represent a plot of land or a platform. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible ornamentation, porches, or additional architectural features. The structure appears compact and functional, suitable for use as a basic residential shelter in an urban or suburban context.
description: A small, rectangular cabin with a dark gable roof, light walls, and minimal detailing, featuring a single door and window on one side.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from an angle showing the front with a centered door and adjacent window, both set in light-colored walls beneath a dark gable roof.
description_view_1: The cabin is viewed from the side, showing only the plain wall and the dark roof, with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_2: The rear of the cabin is visible, displaying a blank wall with no openings and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a plain wall and the dark roof, mirroring the other side with no visible features.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, dark-colored, no visible overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: single small rectangular window adjacent to the door on the front facade, no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, next to the window
